name: Chirp Wheel+ Back Stretcher
description: Spinal canal groove design for deep muscle release. 3-wheel system targets the full back from lumbar to thoracic.

name: Theragun Mini Percussion Device
description: Portable percussive therapy at 150 minutes battery life. Three built-in speeds, triangle ergonomic grip, quiet motor.

name: Hyperice Normatec 3 Leg System
description: Dynamic air compression for lower limb recovery. Seven overlapping zones, Bluetooth app control, 60-minute sessions.

name: Mito Red Light Therapy Panel MitoPRO 300
description: 660nm and 850nm wavelengths. 300 LEDs, 0% flicker, no EMF. Clinical-grade irradiance for tissue repair and inflammation.

name: DonJoy Performance Bionic Knee Brace
description: Four-point leverage system for medial and lateral support. Low-profile design compatible with clinical-grade compression.

name: Thorne Vitamin D3 + K2 Liquid
description: NSF Certified for Sport. D3 and K2 in liquid form for superior absorption. Ideal for patients with musculoskeletal conditions.

name: Pure Encapsulations Magnesium Glycinate
description: 260mg elemental magnesium per serving. Glycinate chelate for high bioavailability and GI tolerability. Hypoallergenic.

name: TriggerPoint GRID Foam Roller
description: Multi-density EVA foam surface. Hollow core holds up to 500 lbs. Used in clinical settings for myofascial release.
